## Summary

## Checklist

- [ ] This PR is clearly scoped and aligned with the maintainer-led roadmap.
- [ ] I have the right to submit this contribution.
- [ ] This PR contains no secrets, private configs, customer data, or proprietary code.
- [ ] This PR does not copy code from unknown or incompatible sources.
- [ ] I understand maintainers may rewrite, defer, or decline external contributions.
- [ ] I understand non-trivial external code may require a DCO sign-off or a separate contributor agreement before merge.
- [ ] This PR does not weaken detector semantics.
- [ ] This PR does not add default-on telemetry.
- [ ] This PR does not claim CallLint proves runtime safety.
- [ ] Required gates were run (`pnpm typecheck`, `test`, `build`, `corpus:test`, `corpus:test:r2-final`) or the reason is explained.
